Author: platis
Name: XIV.fm
Punchline: Share what you are listening to in Final Fantasy XIV.
Description: XIV.fm displays Last.fm listening presence on cards anchored above player nameplates.
Changelog: Private testing build: adds first-run XIV.fm settings and browser-based Last.fm linking, real local listening cards, Private/Public presence, nearby remote cards, duty-safe networking, and the Custom Relay backend. Open /xivfm, enable the development server in Diagnostics, and use https://oracle-dev.tail9c4140.ts.net while connected to the XIV.fm Tailscale network.
